Uses of Class
com.irurueta.units.AngularSpeed

    • Uses of AngularSpeed in com.irurueta.units

      Methods in com.irurueta.units that return AngularSpeed 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static AngularSpeed AngularSpeed.addAndReturnNew(AngularSpeed arg1, AngularSpeed arg2, AngularSpeedUnit unit)
      Adds two angular speeds.
      AngularSpeed AngularSpeed.addAndReturnNew(AngularSpeed s, AngularSpeedUnit unit)
      Adds provided angular speed to current instance and returns a new angular speed.
      AngularSpeed AngularSpeed.addAndReturnNew(double value, AngularSpeedUnit unit, AngularSpeedUnit resultUnit)
      Adds provided angular speed value and unit and returns a new angular speed instance using provided unit.
      AngularSpeed AngularSpeed.addAndReturnNew(Number value, AngularSpeedUnit unit, AngularSpeedUnit resultUnit)
      Adds provided angular speed value and unit and returns a new angular speed instance using provided unit.

      Converts an angular speed to requested output unit.
      AngularSpeed AngularSpeedFormatter.parse(String source)
      Parses provided string and tries to determine an angular speed value and unit.

      Subtracts two angular speeds.

      Subtracts provided angular speed to current instance and returns a new angular speed.

      Subtracts provided angular speed value and unit and returns a new angular speed instance using provided unit.

      Subtracts provided angular speed value and unit and returns a new angular speed instance using provided unit.
